subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! Upon thee be My Glory! In this divine springtime and luminous Day, the friends of God must, with love and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی علیک بهائی در این ربیع رحمانی و یوم نورانی باید اولیای الهی بمحبت و
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @unity; oneness of humanity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
